title: Okil6's biome dimensions
description: Every Biome In Minecraft Is A Dimension!
body:
**This mod makes it so every biome is a dimension!**

**Usefull for compacting spaces into a small area without having to rebuild parts of the biome there**!

**Portal blocks for each dimension:**

Plains - Dirt - Plains Dimension Portal Igniter

Desert - Sand - Desert Dimension Portal Igniter

Warm Ocean - Light Blue Concrete - Warm Ocean Dimension Portal Igniter

Lush Cave - Flowering Azalea Leaves - Lush Caves Dimension Portal Igniter

More Comming Soon!

**Features:**

**Each igniters texture is a unique texture based on the biomes!**



**Recipes can viewed with JEI**



**Source code:**

[Okil6's Biome Dimensions Source Code](https://github.com/okil6dev/Okil6-s-Biome-Dimensions)

Source code is always for latest version of neoforge
